audit_result.proof_trace: Config deserialization (apply_to_chain_spec) assigns fork epochs without validation. If config file contains out-of-order epochs (e.g., deneb_fork_epoch=100, capella_fork_epoch=200), fork_name_at_epoch() returns wrong fork at epoch 150, causing consensus divergence.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Operator loads custom config with deneb_fork_epoch < capella_fork_epoch. At intermediate epochs, node applies wrong fork rules (e.g., Deneb logic instead of Capella), diverging from honest peers and potentially accepting invalid blocks.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-014.text: Fork epoch constants must be strictly ordered: GENESIS < ALTAIR < ... < ELECTRA < FULU.
